clawmachine · 7 app pages · 7 schemes

self-contained reference render for the clawmachine macos swiftui app. same card grammar, density, and type ramp as the codex labs. scheme switcher in the header rescopes across 7 operator-pinned palettes: sc-02 deep current, sc-07 concrete bloom, sc-18 plasma field, sc-25 midnight dream, sc-38 alpine glow, sc-46 coral reef, sc-52 rust oxide.

  • satoshi bold lowercase for display + wordmark · ibm plex sans for body prose · jetbrains mono for numerics and data
  • device silhouettes inline svg · vendor badges palette-coloured · roi pills colour-coded per scheme's p/s
  • analytics: ohlc candles from real numeric arrays · 7-day median dashed band · crosshair + tooltip · o/h/l/c footer
  • radius ≤ 4px · spacing from {4,8,12,16,24,32} · bevel highlight-tl shadow-br · no blur · no gradients beyond edges

clawmachine · sc-02 · deep currentdark · void #060B10 · p #00E5A0 · s #FF5C8A

op14:19:02

queue it. what else in the last hour?
